film.title: Aligarh
film.overview: A sympathetic journalist covers the true story of Ramchandra Siras, an esteemed linguistic professor at Aligarh University who was suspended on charges of homosexuality.

dialogues.dialogue: Think about your future. Write the letter. What should I write? That you're ashamed for whatever happened that night. That's it. Give me an envelope.
They took off my clothes. I kept pleading......not to hit my friend. Just......just so shameful. When suddenly...four of my colleagues came in my bedroom. Your colleagues?

Siras was in his undergarments....and he was apologizing to those reporters. I immediately demanded to see the videotape. And what I saw...was completely vulgar and shameful. What did you see? It was embarrassing.
